_note: Top symbols related to SSR and page generation. renderToHTMLOrFlight is the App Router SSR entry point; renderToHTML is the Pages Router equivalent. renderToHTMLImpl contains the core Pages rendering logic. createComponentTree builds the React element tree for app routes. FlightRenderResult and RenderResult wrap rendering output. BaseServer orchestrates the server-side rendering pipeline. AppPageRouteModule is the route module that invokes rendering. createInlinedDataReadableStream handles streaming RSC data into HTML. collectSegmentData handles segment-level data collection for PPR. All verified to exist in packages/next/src/server/.
